name: imx-security-explorer

_comment_scripts.build: Run build.js: reads data/*.yaml + data/documents/*.yaml, injects a JSON dataset into src/index.html, copies CSS/JS → dist/
_comment_scripts.dev: Build then serve dist/ locally at http://localhost:3000 using npx serve (no install required)
_comment_scripts.clean: Remove dist/ and Python bytecode caches from admin/ (safe to run at any time)
_comment_scripts.clean:all: Full reset — also removes node_modules/ and admin/venv/. Run 'npm install' and recreate the Python venv afterwards
_comment_scripts.rebuild: Clean then build in one step — useful when YAML data or template changes aren't picked up by a normal build

_comment_dependencies: No runtime dependencies — the site ships plain HTML/CSS/JS with no Node.js backend.
_comment_devDependencies: js-yaml is used only by build.js to parse YAML data files at build time. It is not shipped to the browser.
